all.en: Sarah straightened her blue graduation cap and looked around the crowded auditorium.
all.zh: 莎拉整理好她的藍色畢業帽，環顧擁擠的禮堂。

all.en: Three years of high school had flown by faster than she had ever imagined possible.
all.zh: 三年的高中時光比她想像中還要飛快地過去了。

all.en: She remembered the shy girl she had been on her very first day of ninth grade.
all.zh: 她想起九年級第一天那個害羞的自己。

all.en: Back then, she had been afraid to raise her hand or speak in front of the class.
all.zh: 當時，她害怕舉手或在全班面前發言。

all.en: Now she was about to deliver a speech as the elected student representative.
all.zh: 如今她即將以民選學生代表的身分發表演說。

all.en: Her best friends sat in the row behind her, holding flowers and cheering quietly.
all.zh: 她最好的朋友們坐在她後面那一排，手裡拿著花，輕聲歡呼。

all.en: When her name was called, she walked to the stage with tears in her eyes.
all.zh: 當她的名字被喊到時，她眼中含著淚水走向舞台。

all.en: She spoke about friendship, hard work, and the teachers who had shaped her dreams.
all.zh: 她談到了友誼、努力，以及那些塑造了她夢想的老師們。

all.en: The audience applauded warmly, and her parents wiped tears from their proud faces.
all.zh: 觀眾熱烈鼓掌，她的父母從驕傲的臉上擦去淚水。

all.en: After the ceremony, classmates exchanged hugs and promised to stay in touch forever.
all.zh: 典禮結束後，同學們互相擁抱，承諾要永遠保持聯絡。

all.en: Sarah held her diploma tightly, ready to begin the next chapter of her life.
all.zh: 莎拉緊握著她的畢業證書，準備好開始她人生的下一個篇章。
